| `fadd.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 + rs2$ | *Float Add* | R |
| `fsub.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 - rs2$ | *Float Subtract* | R |
| `fmul.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \times rs2$ | *Float Multiply* | R |
| `fdiv.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = rs1 \div rs2$ | *Float Divide* | R |
| `fsqrt.s` | `rd, rs1` | $rd = \sqrt{rs1}$ | *Float Square Root* | R |
| `fmin.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = \min(rs1, rs2)$ | *Float Minimum* | R |
| `fmax.s` | `rd, rs1, rs2` | $rd = \max(rs1, rs2)$ | *Float Maximum* | R |
